allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $browser = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.WebBrowser; $browser.Navigate\('http://localhost:3000'\); Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($browser.Width, $browser.Height\); $browser.DrawToBitmap\($bitmap, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0, 0, $browser.Width, $browser.Height\)\)\); $bitmap.Save\("$PWD\\screenshot.png"\); Write-Host "Screenshot saved")
